summary: Independent QA re-ran the R0 Exit validation and cannot accept R0_GATE=PASS yet. Core R0 scope, JSON parsing, worktree count, protected M7 status count, R1 freeze, audit coverage, roadmap acceptance, ledger restoration, forbidden-path proof, taskctl checks, and systems handoff schema validation pass. However, authoritative coordination state is not internally consistent: goal-mode, continuation, and model-routing still expose stale M7 active route records, and model-routing top-level integration fields lag behind the R0 Exit branch state. This directly contradicts the R0 exit condition that task/status/goal/model/registry/continuation/route state be trustworthy.

tests_run.result: Target worktree clean on codex/rr0-exit-validation-001, ahead of origin/main by 5 before QA handoff write.
RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001, RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001, RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001, and RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 are CLOSED; RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 is REVIEW.
No ready task output; no R1 task is exposed as ready.

tests_run.command: node -e parse all repository JSON files
node forbidden-path filter for 38ad1906ed90fc5084b2010fb3c680daba14bbf6..origin/main and origin/main..HEAD
tests_run.result: 38ad1906..origin/main changed 40 files and origin/main..HEAD changed 10 files; forbidden product/dependency/CI/content/Gate/R1 path count was 0 for both ranges.

tests_run.command: git worktree list --porcelain; git -C D:/WebProjects/MonsoonSovereigns status --short; count status lines
tests_run.result: Exactly two registered worktrees. Protected M7 worktree remains on codex/m7-strategic-terrain-renderer-interaction and has exactly 20 existing status entries.

tests_run.command: node normalized ledger reconstruction against d058cb88:PROJECT_STATUS.md
tests_run.result: After removing the archive banner, restoring the original title, and normalizing line endings, project/history/PROJECT_STATUS-M0-M7-LEDGER.md reconstructs old PROJECT_STATUS.md exactly.

tests_run.command: node audit coverage keyword assertion for Web/Electron, Worker/protocol/sim-core, M3-M7 command, save/load, time control, Storybook/Playwright/Node/canary
tests_run.result: All required audit coverage categories were present.

tests_run.command: node docs/29 roadmap acceptance and R0/R1 gate-boundary keyword assertion
tests_run.result: Roadmap is ACCEPTED, records product owner acceptance, defines R0_GATE, preserves R1 runtime gap, and freezes pre-R1 expansion.

tests_run.command: node current status / goal-mode / model-routing / registry / continuation / route consistency assertions
tests_run.result: Failed: project/model-routing-state.json top-level last_main_commit is 3164c9a5a20794aa4d82300baaa6ac5aa10b31c8 while goal-mode/continuation/current lead route use e8f0050a109d7ade398c63b6950bf3d1a4c9e5b0. Further inspection also found stale active_routes in goal-mode, continuation, and model-routing pointing to M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001.

decisions.decision: REQUEST_CHANGES. Do not close R0 or create R1 tasks until authoritative coordination state is corrected and revalidated.
The missing authoritative Web/Electron runtime remains correctly recorded as an R1 R4 risk, not an R0 baseline failure.
No product code, dependency, content-source, CI, old Gate document, or R1 implementation drift was found in the reviewed diff.

risks.reproduce: Run a consistency assertion comparing model-routing top-level fields with goal-mode, continuation, route, and current lead fields. Actual model top-level last_main_commit is 3164c9a5a20794aa4d82300baaa6ac5aa10b31c8 and last_integrated_task is RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001, while current R0 Exit state uses origin/main e8f0050a109d7ade398c63b6950bf3d1a4c9e5b0 and RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001.
risks.impact: A recovery or routing consumer using model-routing-state as a source of truth can resume from the wrong integrated baseline and miss the status-ledger closure, undermining the R0 requirement that repository/task/status/model state be trustworthy.
risks.necessary_fix: Update or explicitly de-authorize the stale top-level model-routing fields so the current authoritative baseline, last integrated task, and ready/current task fields agree with PROJECT_STATUS, goal-mode, continuation, route, and taskctl output.

risks.reproduce: Read active_task_routes or active_routes in those files: they still point to M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 with ACCEPTED_PENDING_PR_INTEGRATION or SENT_REPLACEMENT. taskctl list and project/tasks/active/M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001.json show that task is CLOSED.
risks.impact: These stale active route records contradict the claim that the only operational child is the current QA reviewer and can direct automation back into a closed M7 route during R0 recovery.
risks.necessary_fix: Clear, archive, or mark these route records as historical/non-operational in all authoritative state files, and ensure the active route surface points only to the current RR0 Exit QA review or is empty by design.

blockers.summary: R0 cannot be accepted while active route and model-routing source-of-truth fields conflict with taskctl, PROJECT_STATUS, route files, goal-mode, and continuation state.

requested_action: Fix only the R0 coordination-state inconsistencies: align or de-authorize stale model-routing top-level fields, clear/archive stale M7 active route records in goal-mode/continuation/model-routing, keep R1 frozen, rerun the RR0 taskctl validate/list/ready, handoff validator, JSON parse, diff checks, forbidden-path proof, worktree/R1 assertions, and return a corrected systems REVIEW handoff for QA.
